meta.name: JCW Strangle-Mania: Viva Las Violence 2026
meta.description: The "Wicked Clowns" are taking over the Strip for a night of pure, unadulterated violence. Juggalo Championship Wrestling presents Strangle-Mania: Viva Las Violence. Streaming Live and Exclisive on TrillerTV+, this event brings the legendary spirit of the Gathering to Las Vegas for a high-stakes, high-impact spectacle.
